title: Personal Trainer

rationales.taskAutomation: Generic workout-plan generation and progress tracking are now handled well by AI fitness apps, but live coaching, form correction, and motivation stay human.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI workout-generation and computer-vision form-tracking apps are mature and widely used by consumers.
rationales.adoption: Consumer adoption of AI fitness apps is substantial and growing, though gym-employed trainers still deliver most in-person sessions.
rationales.agenticExposure: Program design, progress tracking, and check-in messaging are agent-ownable; live spotting, form correction, and motivation are not.

tasksGrowing: Live form correction and injury-prevention coaching
Programming for complex or rehab-specific goals
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 39-9031, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: AI fitness-app integration into client programming

insight: AI apps now generate a competent generic workout plan for free. What clients still pay a trainer for is what an app can't do in the room: catching bad form before it causes an injury and providing the accountability that keeps people showing up.
